MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Whelan Family Partners is present. Represented by Donal McSweeney.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Isabel Gonzalez is present.
Attorney Betsy Strode representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June 17, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
